task_description: Clean cutover to new per-workspace architecture: remove all migration logic, rollback support, legacy wrappers, deprecated APIs, and references to nexus-app-state, nexus-active-project, nexus-default-project, appData/main, cm-migration-status. Wave 1: Fix non-active project hydration.

verification.summary: npm run build passes (exit code 0). No test suite exists in this project. Local-only metadata enrichment step added. Full code-level review performed covering all 13 areas.
